languages.original_text: "Don't beat yourself up, old man. The Warrant was surrounded by thousands of servants and guards, and kept under the best locks — and no one heard a peep! Even my little voices were silent, the sneaks!"

languages.text: "Не кори себя, старик. Патент окружали тысячи слуг и охранников, хранили под лучшими замками — и никто даже шороха не услышал! Даже мои голосочки молчали, поганцы такие!"

"Don't beat yourself up, old man. The Warrant was surrounded by thousands of servants and guards, and kept under the best locks — and no one heard a peep! Even my little voices were silent, the sneaks!"
languages.original_text: "Не кори себя, старик. Патент окружали тысячи слуг и охранников, хранили под лучшими замками — и никто даже шороха не услышал! Даже мои голосочки молчали, поганцы такие!"

"Don't beat yourself up, old man. The Warrant was surrounded by thousands of servants and guards, and kept under the best locks — and no one heard a peep! Even my little voices were silent, the sneaks!"

"Don't beat yourself up, old man. The Warrant was surrounded by thousands of servants and guards, and kept under the best locks — and no one heard a peep! Even my little voices were silent, the sneaks!"

languages.text: 「自分を責めないで、おじいちゃん。ワラントは数千人の召し使いや警護に囲まれて、最高の鍵で施錠されていた。誰も何も聞かなかった。私の小さな声さえも、こっそり沈黙していた！」
languages.original_text: "Don't beat yourself up, old man. The Warrant was surrounded by thousands of servants and guards, and kept under the best locks — and no one heard a peep! Even my little voices were silent, the sneaks!"

traits.locale_text: 「自分を責めないで、おじいちゃん。ワラントは数千人の召し使いや警護に囲まれて、最高の鍵で施錠されていた。誰も何も聞かなかったわ。私の小さな声さえも、こっそり沈黙していたわ！」

languages.text: « Ne vous en voulez pas trop, mon vieux. La lettre de marque était entourée de milliers de serviteurs et de garde, protégée par les verrous les plus solides, mais personne n'a rien entendu ! Même mes petites voix sont restées silencieuses, ces fourbes ! »
languages.original_text: "Don't beat yourself up, old man. The Warrant was surrounded by thousands of servants and guards, and kept under the best locks — and no one heard a peep! Even my little voices were silent, the sneaks!"

traits.locale_text: « Ne vous en voulez pas trop, mon vieux. La lettre de marque était entourée de milliers de serviteurs et de garde, protégée par les verrous les plus solides, mais personne n'a rien entendu ! Même mes petites voix sont restées silencieuses, ces fourbes ! »

languages.text: "Macht Euch keine Vorwürfe, alter Mann. Der Handelsbrief war von Tausenden Dienern und Wachen umgeben und mit den besten Schlössern geschützt ... aber niemand hat etwas gehört! Selbst meine sonst so geschwätzigen Flüsterstimmen haben geschwiegen!"
languages.original_text: "Don't beat yourself up, old man. The Warrant was surrounded by thousands of servants and guards, and kept under the best locks — and no one heard a peep! Even my little voices were silent, the sneaks!"

traits.locale_text: "Macht Euch keine Vorwürfe, alter Mann. Der Handelsbrief war von Tausenden Dienern und Wachen umgeben und mit den besten Schlössern geschützt ... aber niemand hat etwas gehört! Selbst meine sonst so geschwätzigen Flüsterstimmen haben geschwiegen!"

languages.text: "Kendini hırpalama ihtiyar. Ruhsatname'nin etrafı binlerce hizmetkâr ve muhafızla çevriliydi, en iyi kilitler altında tutuluyordu. Faka kimse çıt bile duymadı! Küçük, sinsi seslerim bile tek kelime etmedi!"
languages.original_text: "Don't beat yourself up, old man. The Warrant was surrounded by thousands of servants and guards, and kept under the best locks — and no one heard a peep! Even my little voices were silent, the sneaks!"

traits.locale_text: "Kendini hırpalama ihtiyar. Ruhsatname'nin etrafı binlerce hizmetkâr ve muhafızla çevriliydi, en iyi kilitler altında tutuluyordu. Faka kimse çıt bile duymadı! Küçük, sinsi seslerim bile tek kelime etmedi!"

languages.text: «No se fustigue, anciano. La Patente estaba custodiada por miles de siervos y guardias, a buen recaudo tras las mejores cerraduras, y nadie se ha dado ni cuenta. ¡Hasta mis vocecillas guardaban silencio, las muy traviesas!».
languages.original_text: "Don't beat yourself up, old man. The Warrant was surrounded by thousands of servants and guards, and kept under the best locks — and no one heard a peep! Even my little voices were silent, the sneaks!"

traits.locale_text: «No se fustigue, anciano. La Patente estaba custodiada por miles de siervos y guardias, a buen recaudo tras las mejores cerraduras, y nadie se ha dado ni cuenta. ¡Hasta mis vocecillas guardaban silencio, las muy traviesas!».

languages.text: “别再自责了，老家伙。那份贸易授状身边有成千上万的仆人和卫兵守着，用最精密的锁保护，却没任何人听到半点动静！连我那鬼祟的耳语都缄默无声，真是不可思议！”
languages.original_text: "Don't beat yourself up, old man. The Warrant was surrounded by thousands of servants and guards, and kept under the best locks — and no one heard a peep! Even my little voices were silent, the sneaks!"

traits.locale_text: “别再自责了，老家伙。那份贸易授状身边有成千上万的仆人和卫兵守着，用最精密的锁保护，却没任何人听到半点动静！连我那鬼祟的耳语都缄默无声，真是不可思议！”
